title: Dell Latitude E6430 Laptop WEBCAM - HDMI - Intel Core i5 2.6ghz - 8GB DDR3 - 500GB - DVD - Windows 10 Pro 64bit - (Renewed)

other: I Purchased 2 Dell Latitude Laptops in the last few weeks. One did not work. I ordered another one, same model Laptop and it was damaged from another seller. I contacted Bob at Tek Refurb and explained the damage. I sent the old one back and a much better Laptop was sent to me. It works fine and looks good too. My advise is use a seller with High 90s ratings or better. Bob at Tek Refurb was very h

storage_failure: I bought this laptop because my presentation laptop turned up its toes, and I had a number of conventions to get through this summer. I purchased it in July of 2018.  I had an immediate issue with the battery - but the seller quickly refunded me enough $$ to purchase a new battery. Check. The laptop made it through my presentations this summer, and it continued to work well right up until...tonigh

About a week after I got this computer I started having problems. I contacted Olive Computers but they did not get back to me.

A couple of weeks later, the hard drive quit working. I contacted Olive Computers again. They said they wouldn't or couldn't help me. I contacted Amazon and immediately started a return.

I didn't hear anything for a week so I chatted with Amazon custo

The computer hard drive died less a year of receiving it. I suppose at this price, you can say it was a throw away piece. But the fact that I also wasted money buying Microsoft Office for this thing makes me a bit mad.
wont_power_on: Battery died within 6 months but I used as a desktop until now. Less than 2 years in and no longer will turn on. Booooooo

I contacted the seller and they replaced the power supply and it has been working great.
Had for 1 week and already stopped working
battery_failure:
I use this laptop for online gaming. I have had no problems with the laptop itself, but the battery has given me a few things to complain about.
The charger that was originally given to me stopped working one day after using it. The seller quickly replaced it.
The laptop battery just doesn't want to hold a charge, though. It has to be plugged in to be used because I can't get more than 3
charging_port_failure:
I would not even give a one star for this!

The laptop I received has several cosmetic flaws including dents, chipped paint, scratches, and a stripped screw. It does NOT look "like new". I will put a follow-up review on the working of this laptop....

Follow-up: The charging cord which came with the laptop stopped working within a less than 2 months.
stopped_working:
Update...assurion is refunding me for the $214 but not the $42.99

Mouse pad was acting strange from day one, stopped working within a couple weeks. Exterior mouse worked for a bit, now nothing works. Assurion says it should be under manufacturers warranty, I called manufacturer who looked into it and said I bought a 7 year old computer and I got scammed. Awesome. Paid $214 for laptop
After a year this computer stopped working.
Completely died after less than 3 months. Piece of junk and not worth the money at all.
screen_failure: Bought it for my wife after a month it got stuck on home screen. Don’t buy piece of junk.
